steps.title: Set off though with commas
steps.content: In this sentence, though is a supplementary transition inserted between a signature of her work and the main clause. It needs matching punctuation on both sides.

steps.title: Reject unmatched punctuation
steps.content: B starts the interruption but does not close it, C incorrectly uses a semicolon before the interruption, and D incorrectly closes it with a semicolon. The sentence needs commas on both sides of though. The answer is A.
